title: Alolan Ninetales Battle Guide
summary: The canonical [aurora-veil] setter — [snow-warning] auto-sets snow so [Ice]/[Fairy] Ninetales can enable team-wide defensive boosts.
bodyMarkdown:
## Overview
Alolan Ninetales is the premier [aurora-veil] enabler — [snow-warning] auto-sets snow, and [aurora-veil] provides 1.5x boost to both Defense and Special Defense to the entire team for 5 turns. At 109 Speed with [Fairy] secondary typing, Alolan Ninetales consistently outpaces setup leads and pivots into offensive attackers.

## Strengths
[snow-warning] + [aurora-veil] chains the team-wide screen setup reliably. [Fairy] typing grants [Dragon] immunity, covering a huge offensive threat class. [freeze-dry] is the signature tech — a [Water] super-effective [Ice] move that punishes [kingdra] and [gyarados]. [blizzard] becomes fully accurate in snow, making it the dominant [Ice] STAB.

## Weaknesses & Answers
Four weaknesses — [Fire], [Rock], [Steel], [Poison] — make Alolan Ninetales vulnerable to common meta attackers. Physical bulk at 73/75 folds to priority or super-effective hits. The 81 Special Attack stat limits damage ceiling, so it's primarily a support unit.

## Recommended Moveset
[aurora-veil] is the locked core utility move. [blizzard] is the accurate spread attack in snow. [moonblast] is the secondary STAB for [Dragon] and [Dark] targets. [freeze-dry] is the tech slot for [Water] coverage.

## Item · Ability · Tera
[light-clay] extends [aurora-veil] duration from 5 to 8 turns — the standard support item. [choice-scarf] works for faster offensive variants. [snow-warning] is mandatory. Tera [Fairy] stacks [moonblast] and improves defenses, Tera [Ice] maxes [blizzard] output.

## Teammates & Synergy
Pair with strong offensive attackers who benefit from the [aurora-veil] boost — [Ice] sweepers like [kyurem] double up with snow damage. Cover [Fire] and [Steel] weaknesses with [Water] or [Ground] partners. [fake-out] support protects setup.

## Play Patterns
Lead, set snow automatically, protect on risk turns, and click [aurora-veil] on the first safe turn. After screens are up, swap to an offensive threat. If Ninetales survives, start firing [blizzard] and [moonblast] while the team attacks behind screens.
